subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast stood firm in the Covenant! Well done, and again well done, for thou hast remained steadfast, hast grown, hast made clear and hast demonstrated with conclusive proofs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی المیثاق احسنت ثم احسنت بما ثبت و نبت و بینت و اوضحت بادله قاطعه
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @firmness in the Covenant, @avoidance of Covenant-Breakers, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
